### DESCRIPCIÓN

Why use p and q when I can use more?Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 59867.

### SOLUCIÓN

```                                
┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Desktop/Crypto3]
└─$ nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 59867        
c: 
n: 
e: 65537

```

```
  GNU nano 8.6                            RSA                                      
c = 593696561578469785883766410263925539145672464885697454096147094326308442584663>
n = 872869709095129312768931534492677447608095323230783184817664052821169743070396>
e = 65537

# obtenido de https://www.alpertron.com.ar/ECM.HTM
tn = 87286970676497658553596774678267788834219318676554649821256091713373699916484>

d = pow(e, -1, tn)
m = pow(c, d, n)

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

print(flag)

```

picoCTF{too_many_fact0rs_3023548}
